languages.text: "Настали тяжелые времена, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Люди гибнут не только от голода и нападок врагов Человечества. Мороз, чуждый жителям Гордости Сантиэля, уносит не меньше жизней. А потому мы срезаем одежды с погибших, чтобы позже очистить их и переработать на нужды Детей Искупления".

traits.locale_text: "Настали тяжелые времена, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Люди гибнут не только от голода и нападок врагов Человечества. Мороз, чуждый жителям Гордости Сантиэля, уносит не меньше жизней. А потому мы срезаем одежды с погибших, чтобы позже очистить их и переработать на нужды Детей Искупления".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Настали тяжелые времена, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Люди гибнут не только от голода и нападок врагов Человечества. Мороз, чуждый жителям Гордости Сантиэля, уносит не меньше жизней. А потому мы срезаем одежды с погибших, чтобы позже очистить их и переработать на нужды Детей Искупления".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."
languages.original_text: "Настали тяжелые времена, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Люди гибнут не только от голода и нападок врагов Человечества. languages.text: "Die Zeiten sind hart, o himmlischer Gesandter. Nicht nur, dass die Menschen dem Hunger und den Plünderungen der Feinde der Menschheit erliegen, der Frost ist den Bewohnern von Santiels Stolz fremd und hat ebenso viele Menschenleben gefordert, wenn nicht mehr. Deshalb haben wir die Gewänder der Verstorbenen abgeschnitten, um sie später zu reinigen und den Bedürfnissen der Kinder der Erlösung entsprechend zu verarbeiten."
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."

languages.text: "Les temps sont durs, ô Envoyé céleste. Non seulement les gens succombent à la faim et aux déprédations des ennemis de l'humanité, mais le gel est étranger aux habitants de la Fierté de Santiel et a fait autant de victimes, si ce n'est plus. C'est pourquoi nous coupons les vêtements des défunts afin de pouvoir les purifier plus tard et les traiter en fonction des besoins des enfants de la Rédemption."
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."

languages.text: "时局艰难，天国使者啊。人们不仅要忍受饥饿和人类敌人的蹂躏，霜冻也与桑提尔之傲的居民格格不入，甚至夺去了更多人的生命。这就是为什么我们要割下死者的衣服，以便日后清洗，并根据救赎之子的需要进行处理。"
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."

languages.text: "Los tiempos son duros, oh Enviado Celestial. No sólo la gente sucumbe al hambre y a las depredaciones de los enemigos de la Humanidad, la escarcha es ajena a los habitantes del Orgullo de Santiel y se ha cobrado tantas vidas, si no más. Por eso cortamos las vestiduras de los difuntos para poder limpiarlas más tarde y procesarlas de acuerdo con las necesidades de los Hijos de la Redención".
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."

languages.text: 「天の使者よ、時代は厳しい。人々は飢えと人類の敵の略奪に屈するだけでなく、霜はサンティエルのプライドの住人にとって異質なものであり、多くの命を奪っている。そのため、我々は死者の衣服を切り離し、後で浄化し、贖罪の子供たちの必要性に応じて処理できるようにしたのです」。
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."

languages.text: "Zor zamanlar geçiriyoruz, ey Cennet Elçisi. İnsanlar sadece açlığa ve İnsanoğlunun düşmanlarının yağmalarına yenik düşmekle kalmıyor, Santiel'in Gururu'nun sakinlerine yabancı olan don, daha fazla olmasa da bir o kadar can aldı. İşte bu yüzden ölenlerin giysilerini kesiyoruz ki daha sonra onları temizleyebilelim ve Kefaretin Çocuklarının ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda işleyebilelim."
languages.original_text: "The times are harsh, o Heavenly Envoy. Not only do people succumb to hunger and depredations of the enemies of Mankind, the frost is alien to the denizens of Santiel's Pride and has claimed just as many lives if not more. Which is why we cut away the garments of the deceased so that later we could cleanse them and process in accordance with the needs of the Children of Redemption."
